name: Aruba Email & Calendar MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Aruba's Italian email and calendar hosting services via IMAP/SMTP and CalDAV protocols. Enables AI agents to read email, send messages, and manage calendar events through Aruba's email hosting — supporting Italian businesses using Aruba's hosting infrastructure.
use_cases: Reading and managing email from Aruba-hosted accounts via AI agents
Sending email through Aruba SMTP from automation agents
Managing CalDAV calendar events from productivity AI agents
Building email and calendar automation for Italian businesses on Aruba hosting
not_for: Gmail, Outlook, or other email providers
Teams outside Italy without Aruba accounts
best_when: An Italian business or professional using Aruba's email and calendar hosting wants AI agents to manage communications and scheduling — automating routine email and calendar tasks.
avoid_when: You use Gmail, Outlook, Exchange, or other email providers. Aruba is primarily an Italian hosting provider with a specific Italian market focus.

auth.notes: Aruba email account credentials (username/password) for IMAP/SMTP and CalDAV. Standard email auth — use app-specific passwords where available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free MCP server; Aruba email hosting subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP server; Aruba email plans apply
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Aruba email hosting subscription required.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Email access exposes personal and business communications
Aruba-specific — only relevant for Italian Aruba email hosting customers
IMAP/SMTP credentials must be secured — use app-specific passwords
NEVER enable autonomous email sending without human approval
Niche community tool with limited maintenance
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Email communications are highly sensitive. IMAP/SMTP credentials must be secured. GDPR compliance for EU/Italian data. Never autonomous sending.

security_score_components.security_notes: Email privacy. IMAP/SMTP credentials security. GDPR compliance for Italian/EU data. TLS for email transport.
